history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A chibi-style anime character with large, expressive golden eyes and light brown hair styled with pigtails held by red clips, wearing a blue and white sailor-style outfit with a blue cap. The character has horse-like ears adorned with blue accents. To the right of the character, the word "MAMBO" is written in bold, distressed black lettering, with the 'O' replaced by a red broken heart symbol. The background appears to be a blurred outdoor scene, possibly a park or a street, with muted, desaturated colors suggesting an overcast or late-day setting. The overall mood is a mix of playful and dramatic, conveyed by the character's wide-eyed expression and the stark "MAMBO" text with the broken heart. The art style is distinctly anime, with soft shading and exaggerated features typical of chibi characters.
